arts.ttl: Chelsea identify possible Jadon Sancho transfer replacement as £42.2m decision made - Kieran Horn
arts.sum: If the Blues can negotiate a cheaper deal which sees them avoid paying the £42million release clause, then it is definitely worth at least considering, but time will likely be better spent on other players and also different positions. With all that being said, football.london has taken a look at the latest Chelsea transfer rumours and news.

arts.ttl: Chelsea dressing room's response to Moises Caicedo speaks volumes as brilliant new nickname given
arts.sum: The Chelsea dressing room response to Moises Caicedo shows they clearly agree with Enzo Maresca's decision to make him a key part of the club's Champions League push. Click this link to follow the football.london Chelsea WhatsApp channel, where you'll be kept up to date on the latest Blues news wherever you are.

arts.ttl: Raheem Sterling decision made as £30m defender starts in different position: Arsenal predicted starting XI v PSV

arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer news: Blues receive Alejandro Garnacho CONFIRMATION
arts.sum: The Red Devils have been tipped to consider offers for the pair amid their current financial woes, while Ruben Amorim has previously admitted that Man Utd will need to sell before they can buy this summer. Sir Jim Ratcliffe has confirmed that Manchester United will not be required to sell Alejandro Garnacho or Kobbie Mainoo during the 2025 summer transfer window.

arts.ttl: Report: Jadon Sancho could make the shock return to Man United this summer
arts.sum: Jadon Sancho’s Manchester United future remains uncertain despite spending the season on loan at Chelsea – with it reported that the winger may return to Old Trafford at the end of the season. When Man United sent him to Stamford Bridge last summer, it’s thought that they included a clause that would see Chelsea sign […] The post Report: Jadon Sancho could make the shock return to Man United this summer appeared first on CaughtOffside.
